text.text: Gain the following abilities of the Voricaous Pan: Gain the effect of Endless Bloodlust/ Growing Hunger when held in main hand
Gain +0.5 attack damage and +0.5 armor every time you kill a new mob.

effects: you have to spend §699.5%§5 of your time in the world suffering the §6Seven Curses
